place.summary: Po Lin Monastery functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Ngong Ping Village. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland. It performs above its category average on observed experience.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Po Lin Monastery frequently appears alongside Hong Kong Disneyland, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

journey_examples.trajectory: Po Lin Monastery -> Hong Kong Disneyland
